blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Could not obtain an assistant response containing a wiki-path mention to click. Mission guidance states Pi Agent CLI is unavailable in this environment.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented panel-wiring chat-mention blocking procedure and chat connection wait guidance for chat pre-fill assertions.

orchestratorOverride.action: Deferred VAL-WIRE-003 to misc-polish milestone. Assertion tests pre-existing MessageText functionality (ChatPanel.tsx) which requires Pi Agent CLI to generate assistant messages with wiki paths. Pi Agent is unavailable in test environment. The code (findWikiPageMentions + clickable button rendering) is confirmed working from prior commits. Assertion will be re-tested when Pi Agent becomes available.
